headline: STM vs. NXPI: Which Automotive Chipmaker Is the Better Pick Now?
summary: STMicroelectronics and NXP Semiconductors are expanding automotive chip portfolios as AI, EV and software-defined vehicle demand accelerates.

headline: Cantor Fitzgerald Maintains Overweight on NXP Semiconductors, Raises Price Target to $400
summary: Cantor Fitzgerald  analyst C.J. Muse   maintains NXP Semiconductors (NASDAQ:NXPI) with a Overweight and raises the price target from $380 to $400.
